title: mls: room_hpke_keypair returns plain [u8;32] secret key; callers do not zeroize
description: MlsClient::room_hpke_keypair() (core/src/mls.rs:383) returns ([u8;32], [u8;32]) where the first element is the epoch-bound HPKE secret key. The x25519_dalek::StaticSecret implements Zeroize on drop but the bytes are copied out via .to_bytes() before the secret drops. The returned [u8;32] is not Zeroizing. CLI callers (cli/src/commands.rs lines 343, 644, 1055, 1601) hold the secret as Option<[u8;32]>; when the epoch advances and the field is overwritten with Some(new_sk), the old 32 bytes remain on the heap until the allocator reclaims them. Same class as nie-kef6.55 and nie-kef6.77 but for the room HPKE key path. Fix: return (Zeroizing<[u8;32]>, [u8;32]) and update callers to store as Option<Zeroizing<[u8;32]>>.
